arts.ttl: Arsenal fans are all saying the same thing after Oleksandr Zinchenko refuses to celebrate after scoring for the Gunners against PSV in the Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal fans reacted to Oleksandr Zinchenko's strike against PSV Eindhoven on Wednesday night with a markedly similar reaction.

arts.ttl: ‘Concrete’ – Sky Sports reporter provides evening Alexander Isak and Arsenal update
arts.sum: Arsenal have Alexander Isak in their sights ahead of the summer transfer window, according to reports. Sky Sports Germany reporter Florian Plettenberg has posted another update regarding the Newcastle United star and the Gunners. arts.ttl: Andrea Berta hatches £300m Arsenal transfer plan to sign seven players
arts.sum: With Arsenal looking set to miss out on the Premier League title for the third straight season, Mikel Arteta is expected to welcome a number of new faces for the 2025/26 season. The 53-year-old has experience with Atletico Madrid and a number of Italian clubs, helping the Rojiblancos become league champions.

arts.ttl: Jonas Eidevall has 'no regrets' over Arsenal exit
arts.sum: Former Arsenal manager Jonas Eidevall has opened up on his departure from the club and insists he has no regrets

arts.ttl: Arsenal incoming sporting director Andrea Berta eyes transfer of €85m Brazil international
arts.sum: Arsenal’s sporting director-elect Andrea Berta is reportedly keeping an eye on Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes. The Gunners are gearing up for a big summer shake up with a major midfield upgrade at the top of their agenda. arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Atléti-Real Madrid, Arsenal-PSV
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Atlético Madrid take on Real Madrid, Arsenal take on PSV and Aston Villa take on Brugge.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel Jesus issues huge injury update as Mikel Arteta handed return boost
arts.sum: Gabriel Jesus has issued an update on his rehabilitation process since suffering a season-ending injury at the start of January. Footage is included of Jesus treating his knee on the sofa with the help of an Arsenal physio.

arts.ttl: A defensive bargain, the £115m Premier League flop - and Rodri: Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta's BEST and WORST transfers at Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Andrea Berta may sound like an unknown name for most Premier League fans, but undeniably, he has gained a reputation when it comes to sealing initially thought-impossible deals.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Club Brugge, Arsenal v PSV: Champions League last 16, second legs – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates, 8pm kick-offs, and more Live scores | Read today’s Football Daily | And mail Will “You have to feel for Nathan Butler-Oyedeji,” writes Kieran McKintosh. “He’s 22, still not had a proper first-team appearance, not even scored on loan at Cheltenham or Accrington, and even in a game like this where it basically doesn’t matter who Arteta plays, a defender who is leaving at the end of the season gets a start up top before he does. Ouch.” I have a feeling the young lad’s long-term future is not at Arsenal. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Samu Aghehowa asking price 'revealed' with Barcelona, Arsenal, Chelsea 'going to war' for star forward
arts.sum: Porto will reportedly refuse to sell Samu Aghehowa, who has been linked with Barcelona, Arsenal and Chelsea, for under €80m (£67m) during this summer's transfer window.
